summary: Completed frontend re-verification after SpecialOrderDetail.jsx refactor (527→365 lines). All refactored components render correctly, F-3 MTO workflow (Buat SKU → Konversi SO) works end-to-end, permissions enforced, and Returns/Credit Note flow fully functional.
passed_tests: Login works for manager and sales via demo buttons
Special Order list loads with SORD-260618-0002 visible
Special Order detail view loads with data-testid='special-order-detail-view'

REFACTORED SpecialOrderInfoPanels component renders all panels: Custom Item Details (description, specifications table, quantity, target price, total amount, expected delivery), Customer Info, Status Timeline
As MANAGER: 'Buat SKU Produk' button visible and functional - creates SKU (MTO-260618-0002), SKU chip appears with data-testid='special-order-linked-sku'
After SKU creation: 'Konversi ke Sales Order' button appears with data-testid='special-order-convert-btn'
Konversi workflow: converts to SO (KANDA/SO-00009), SO chip appears with data-testid='special-order-linked-so', buttons disappear (idempotent)
As SALES: all manager/admin-only buttons correctly hidden (create-sku, convert, approve, reject) - permission check PASSED
Create Return form loads with data-testid='create-return-form'
Return type select includes all required options: Retur, Barang Sisa (BS), Penggantian, Komplain (keluhan kualitas), Garansi (klaim jaminan)
ReturnTypeBadge renders 'Garansi' correctly with teal badge (badge-teal)
Approved return generates Credit Note: chip appears (data-testid='return-credit-note-chip'), section renders (data-testid='return-credit-note-section') with CN-00001
Credit Note details displayed: number (data-testid='credit-note-number'), gross amount (data-testid='credit-note-gross')
Returns list shows CN badge (data-testid='return-cn-{id}') for approved returns with credit notes

success_percentage.backend: N/A (backend testing skipped as requested - iteration_58 already validated 16/16 pass)
